action: C5 flip phase-gate handoff validation WARN → FAIL after one clean verification cycle. Add NEW scripts/observability/show-handoff.sh <cycle> <phase> for tabular operator inspection. Author ADR 0010 deprecating prose-only era with migration guidance for downstream consumers of audit-report.md prose. ~200 LoC. Files: scripts/lifecycle/phase-gate.sh, NEW scripts/observability/show-handoff.sh, NEW docs/adr/0010-handoff-schema-enforcement.md.
operator_note: BLOCKED-BY: C4 + one clean verification cycle (system runs end-to-end with WARN-only mode logging zero schema mismatches before flipping to FAIL). Follows v8.55 ladder pattern: opt-in → verify → default-on → enforce. ADR 0010 documents the prose-only era's deprecation and provides migration guidance. show-handoff.sh provides tabular per-phase summary for operator dashboards (similar pattern to show-context-monitor.sh and show-cycle-cost.sh). Final stage of the structured-handoff initiative.
